reason: User reported repeated false mask passes after strict QA prose updates. Policy alone was insufficient, so current Wave70 mask work is fail-closed behind a mechanical hard promotion gate.

corrected_interpretation.generated_output_safe: The generated artifact did not visibly break under low denoise; this does not prove mask correctness.
corrected_interpretation.mask_alignment_pass: Not granted for any existing worked mask until hard-gate evidence proves source-aligned target coverage and protected-neighbor clearance.
corrected_interpretation.candidate_acceptance: Not granted for any existing worked mask until hard-gate evidence exists.
corrected_interpretation.done_complete_certification_ready: Not allowed without hard-gate evidence, reference-matrix proof when required, and target-runtime proof for final certification.
